name: trustmodel
description: Trust evaluation, red-team, and governance for AI agents via the Model Context Protocol.
long_description: Score AI output across 10 trust dimensions (local, no key), gate it against policy packs (EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, NYC LL144, OWASP LLM), capture and evaluate agentic traces, and run calibrated cloud scoring with a free TrustModel API key.

api_key.title: TrustModel API key
api_key.description: Free key (5 credits / $500) for calibrated cloud scoring. Optional — local eval and govern work without it. Get one at https://app.trustmodel.ai

profile.title: Tool profile
profile.description: 'default' = 6 daily-driver tools; 'security' = all 22 (red team, shadow AI, MCP scan, cloud batch, AgentCert).
